title: Apply quality system and continuous improvement processes
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply quality system and continuous improvement processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Satisfy quality system requirements in daily work

pcs.text: Access information on quality system requirements for own job function
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access information on quality system requirements for own job function?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access information on quality system requirements for own job function.

pcs.text: Record and monitor quality control data in accordance with quality system requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and monitor quality control data in accordance with quality system requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and monitor quality control data in accordance with quality system requirements.

pcs.text: Recognise and report non-conformances or problems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and report non-conformances or problems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and report non-conformances or problems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Satisfy quality system requirements in daily work

elements.title: Identify risks and/or opportunities for improvements

pcs.text: Compare current work practices, procedures and process or equipment performance with requirements and other available information

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare current work practices, procedures and process or equipment performance with requirements and other available information.

pcs.text: Recognise variances that indicate abnormal or sub-optimal performance posing a risk to product, services or end users
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise variances that indicate abnormal or sub-optimal performance posing a risk to product, services or end users?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise variances that indicate abnormal or sub-optimal performance posing a risk to product, services or end users.

pcs.text: Collect and/or evaluate information to determine possible causes for sub-optimal performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and/or evaluate information to determine possible causes for sub-optimal performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and/or evaluate information to determine possible causes for sub-optimal performance.

pcs.text: Use quality improvement tools and techniques to rank the probabilities of possible causes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use quality improvement tools and techniques to rank the probabilities of possible causes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use quality improvement tools and techniques to rank the probabilities of possible causes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify risks and/or opportunities for improvements

elements.title: Recommend actions

pcs.text: Analyse causes to predict likely impacts of changes and decide on appropriate actions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse causes to predict likely impacts of changes and decide on appropriate actions.

pcs.text: Identify required changes to standards and procedures and training
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify required changes to standards and procedures and training?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify required changes to standards and procedures and training.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report recommendations to designated personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report recommendations to designated personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Recommend actions

elements.title: Participate in the implementation of recommended actions

pcs.text: Implement approved actions and monitor performance following changes to evaluate results

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement approved actions and monitor performance following changes to evaluate results.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document outcomes of actions and communicate them to relevant personnel.
